cuts.video_prompt: No background music. NO BGM. NO score. SFX only. RUNTIME: 6 seconds. CAMERA: ARRI ALEXA Mini LF, ZEISS, anamorphic 2.39:1. TIME: late morning, warm amber. CHARACTER: RAE, same identity as reference. SHOT GROUP — 6 SECOND SEQUENCE: BEGINS WITH (0:00-0:01) she pushes off the bench. ACTION (0:01-0:04) she rises to full height, shoulders rolling back. TRANSITION (0:04-0:05) her jaw sets with renewed focus. ENDS WITH (0:05-0:06) she takes a first powerful step, match-cut out. LIGHT: warm backlight haloing her rising silhouette, negative fill on her front. SFX: fabric rustle, deep breath.

No background music. NO BGM. NO score. SFX only. RUNTIME: 6 seconds. CAMERA: ARRI ALEXA Mini LF, ZEISS, anamorphic 2.39:1. TIME: late morning, amber turning gold.
